hyperedges.label: Japanese Foreign Bond Bid: Hedged vs. Unhedged Tug-of-War (Banks/Lifers/Nochu vs. MoF/GPIF)
Japanese Life Insurer Asset-Intensive Reinsurance Ecosystem (Post-2020, BOJ Rate Hike Context)
BOJ Hike → Hedging Cost Improvement → Hedge Ratio Recovery Chain
ESR/J-ICS Regulation → Duration Gap Reduction → Super-Long JGB Accumulation Chain
High Hedging Costs (Pre-BOJ Hike) → Reduced Hedged Foreign Bonds → Increased Unhedged Positions
US-Japan Yield Differential → Yen Carry Accumulation → BOJ Hike + US Slowdown → Carry Unwind → Yen Appreciation
Historic-Low Hedge Ratio + Steepening Yield Curve → Potential Hedge Ratio Recovery → Yen Purchase Demand → Currency Basis Widening
Japanese Life Insurer FX Risk Nexus — JGB Yield Spike + USD/JPY Move + Hedge Ratio Dynamics
Passive Repatriation Mechanism — JGB Yield Rise → UST-JGB Spread Narrowing → Capital Inflow → JPY Appreciation
PE-Linked Insurer Risk Ecosystem — Search for Yield + AIR + Offshore Reinsurance + Policy Surrenders + FABS/FHLB
Asia Insurer FX and Repatriation Shock — Japanese and Taiwanese Lifers + Wrong-Way Risk + Capital Nationalism
Global Insurance Systemic Risk Cluster — NBFI SRISK, FX Derivatives, Policy Surrenders, Liquidity Stress

hyperedges.label: Japanese Foreign Bond Bid: Hedged vs. Unhedged Tug-of-War (Banks/Lifers/Nochu vs. MoF/GPIF)
Japanese Life Insurer Asset-Intensive Reinsurance Ecosystem (Post-2020, BOJ Rate Hike Context)
BOJ Hike → Hedging Cost Improvement → Hedge Ratio Recovery Chain
ESR/J-ICS Regulation → Duration Gap Reduction → Super-Long JGB Accumulation Chain
High Hedging Costs (Pre-BOJ Hike) → Reduced Hedged Foreign Bonds → Increased Unhedged Positions
US-Japan Yield Differential → Yen Carry Accumulation → BOJ Hike + US Slowdown → Carry Unwind → Yen Appreciation
Historic-Low Hedge Ratio + Steepening Yield Curve → Potential Hedge Ratio Recovery → Yen Purchase Demand → Currency Basis Widening
Japanese Life Insurer FX Risk Nexus — JGB Yield Spike + USD/JPY Move + Hedge Ratio Dynamics
Passive Repatriation Mechanism — JGB Yield Rise → UST-JGB Spread Narrowing → Capital Inflow → JPY Appreciation
PE-Linked Insurer Risk Ecosystem — Search for Yield + AIR + Offshore Reinsurance + Policy Surrenders + FABS/FHLB
Asia Insurer FX and Repatriation Shock — Japanese and Taiwanese Lifers + Wrong-Way Risk + Capital Nationalism
Global Insurance Systemic Risk Cluster — NBFI SRISK, FX Derivatives, Policy Surrenders, Liquidity Stress
